title: StepFingerprint
description: Composite hash record for one step. Used by the resume invalidation walker: on resume, recompute each succeeded step's composite; if it differs from the recorded composite, mark the step and its DAG descendants 'invalidated'.

depends_on_config_fields.description: Dotted paths into run_config.json (e.g. 'box.padding_nm', 'ion_strategy.salt_M') that this step is sensitive to. Code-validated against run_config.schema.json: every dotted path must resolve to a real field.

tool_components.description: Per-step declaration of which tool components feed tool_hash (e.g. gmx_version, ff_dir_hash, dialogue_runner_code_hash). Audit only; tool_hash is the authoritative composite.
